---
title: "Trucktrack filter pipeline"
author: "Jesse Tweedle"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
lightbox: auto
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Stale ping](figures/stale-before.png){group="filters"}

![Stale ping — filtered](figures/stale-after.png){group="filters"}

![Stale ping — matcher detour](figures/stale-map-before.png){group="filters"}

![Stale ping — clean route](figures/stale-map-after.png){group="filters"}

![Impossible speed](figures/speed-before.png){group="filters"}

![Impossible speed — filtered](figures/speed-after.png){group="filters"}

![Observation gap](figures/gap-before.png){group="filters"}

![Observation gap — split](figures/gap-after.png){group="filters"}

![Observation gap — matcher loop](figures/gap-map-before.png){group="filters"}

![Observation gap — clean route](figures/gap-map-after.png){group="filters"}

![Stop (long idle)](figures/stop-before.png){group="filters"}

![Stop — separated](figures/stop-after.png){group="filters"}

![Traffic jam (false stop)](figures/traffic-before.png){group="filters"}

![Traffic jam — reclassified](figures/traffic-after.png){group="filters"}

![Real stop — preserved](figures/traffic-real-stop.png){group="filters"}
:::
